body:
Hi Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to share the updated deck for [NovaMind](people/jordan-park) ahead of our call on Thursday. We've incorporated the feedback you gave on the compute cost projections and revised the go-to-market timeline to reflect a more phased approach, starting with two anchor enterprise pilots rather than a broad rollout. I also added a section on our infrastructure partnerships, which I think directly addresses your questions around model efficiency at scale. Let me know if you'd like me to walk through anything in advance, or if there's a specific section you'd like me to focus on during the call. Looking forward to the conversation.

— Jordan
